title: Evangelion 30 10 delayed Again
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by wiser3754 » Wed Jan 13, 2021 5:49 pm https://www.google.com.au/amp/s/gamerant.com/evangelion-3-01-0-gets-another-delay-amid-tightening-covid-measures-japan/amp/ UPDATE -- tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) It's (not) on

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by Fredsq » Wed Jan 13, 2021 5:58 pm I'd be more than happy to pay 2 or even 5 times a movie theatre fee to watch it at my place. Without subs.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by The_Max » Wed Jan 13, 2021 6:02 pm I think this is the announcement of a couple of days ago where they announced the cancel of the 00:00 session but release date 23-01-2021 is maintained

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by Joseki » Wed Jan 13, 2021 6:04 pm Cough cough FAKE NEWS Just click on the source of the article OP and you can read the original news being reported correctly.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by GhostlyOcam » Wed Jan 13, 2021 6:04 pm Khara's tweet was already posted and discussed in the social media thread and this reply perfectly reflects my reaction to that "article", which is obviously written by someone who doesn't know Japanese or bother to read the rest of the announcement: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by Cookie H Wilson » Wed Jan 13, 2021 6:05 pm Awww Fuck me So what is the truth Oprahs?

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by EscapismIsBad » Wed Jan 13, 2021 6:08 pm XD XD XD XD XD I cannot even react properly to this.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by Melkor » Wed Jan 13, 2021 6:14 pm So false alarm?

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed. . . Again. Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jan 13, 2021 6:58 pm The alarm is fall and this thread is getting locked.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 14, 2021 5:36 am While OP may have jumped the gun, several posts above have not aged well... tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by Joseki » Thu Jan 14, 2021 5:38 am Well it was a fake news a few hours ago I'd say it's better to use the current release date thread, no? It contains the previous release date drama too.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Thu Jan 14, 2021 5:38 am 100% YES ITS DELAYED AGAIN. AS OF 30 OR SO MINS AGO

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by The_Max » Thu Jan 14, 2021 5:43 am The new delay is to match with "thrice upon a time" whatever

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jan 14, 2021 6:01 am Awwww, nuts.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by wiser3754 » Thu Jan 14, 2021 8:57 am Might as well lock the thread or remove it. My original intention was to post on the Release date thread but I figured a new post would catch more attention.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 delayed... Again Post by Zusuchan » Thu Jan 14, 2021 9:43 am Will lock this thread. Also, may I suggest not doing things here simply for becoming more famous? There are certain standards for this forum.
